user_query: I'm planning a surprise party for my best friend's graduation. Can you help me find out who they follow on Instagram and get their followers? Also, I want to check if they have any recent stories and view them.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the accounts that the user follows on Instagram.
Retrieve the followers of the user on Instagram.
Check for any recent stories posted by the user on Instagram.
Retrieve and display the content of the recent stories.
